figures.caption: Fig. 2: GST-VLA framework. Two frozen encoders produce semantic features and metric depth. The LoRA adapted GST lifts these into Ng=128 anisotropic 3D Gaussian tokens via four operations. A cross-attention projector injects spatial tokens into the VLM, where DA-CoT sublayers attend to the raw 256-primitive Gaussian field. The action expert receives dual conditioning: VLM hidden states (semantic and visual context) and DA-CoT action tokens (3D geometric reasoning).
